title: Blebcraft
description: This pack is created to provide a simple one-click solution for blebs that want a good starting ground playing on the Blebcraft server. It includes a bunch of handy QoL mods and shaders, as well as the official blebpack resource-pack
body:
The first official Blebcraft modpack!

This pack is created to provide a simple one-click solution for blebs that want a good starting ground playing on the Blebcraft server.

It includes a bunch of handy QoL mods and shaders.

Of course, the blebpack is also included! This pack adds a lot of unique and fun little blebby textures, sounds and texts.

This pack will broadly follow the same update schedule as the official server!
